item.title: Several tools, techniques, factories ... I've found amazing recently.
item.description:
Casting low-melt alloy bars
2. Car Factory Robots
3. Ceiling work made easy
4. Kinda gross but efficient
5. Simple invention DIY Handmade Tools
6. High-Speed CNC Machining in Action
7. Looks nice and smooth
8. It's that easy ! get a good knocker.
9. This Screwdriver.
10. TIL about plastic welders.
11. For people that work on the ground. Banana for scale.
12. One fits all. Works probably on new screws only.
13. Broom head factory.
14. Foam so smooth it looks like he’s working with whipped cream.
15. Physical Key Copying.

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 15
item.description:
Is this thing on?
Ah nuts
I ONLY fart sexy style ;)
Poorly and then I wake up with something hurting because I apparently did it wrong :/
I can’t remember if it was on Imgur or Reddit where I saw someone say they sing a song to their dog that goes “My name is Beatrice. I have to pee-ah-triss”
Fucking bet
Every fucking time
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Meeeeeeeeeme dump 2nd for the day
item.description:
Dunno how many dumps I'll do tonight but we'll see when the dog gets up from her nap. She played hard with her cousin this afternoon. Until then, enjoy!
Holy shit it's only Monday
Hey. My own dump isn't supposed to make me cry.
Last week at the grocery store, an old white man yelled at the deli clerk, "hey! Do you guys have any of that jarlsburg stuff?" But he pronounced it "Jar-els-berg". I stopped and bluescreened a minute before moving on without commenting. It's good cheese, it doesn't deserve that disrespect. Neither does the cheese girl.
[Cough] my dad [cough]
I bet it honked and spit steam
Saved this for my dad, who taught me basic electrical work. He cackled at the guy going over the fence.
I need an SO so I can play this game. It's so stupid, I love it.
100% border collie behavior
I've seen healthier looking people with severe metabolic diseases
Hell of a way to learn I'm radical reformed. I always thought I was ultra protestant as an ELCA Lutheran who thinks the church with lesbian pastors is still too conservative
Why are you booing me, I'm right
Meerkatting. I might try this at work the next time my fellow millennials are all in the office.
What's that you said about my ma, mate? Come at me. I'll bite your legs off.
They're good dogs Bront
Also a good dog
I don't think people should be taking medical advice from me.... BRO IT'S YOUR JOB. You don't deserve it, but still.
Look Bones, no hands!
Taught a class on the psych of video games. Used this to discuss grief. Quoted this at least 7x that day.
Fuck you, rich tourists, I do what I want.
I didn't have the power glove but my brother in law did. And a virtual boy!!!
Lmao, reminds me of a student who fact checked me in class (which I encourage) and got mad that I was right. Sweetie, I spent 10 years extra in school for this, lol.
♡
Chaotic good. Do what has to be done.
I go through mints like crazy, but they do help
Best part of this is Myamoto in his nerdy little t shirt
My 1yo collie doesn't give a shit if someone is holding her tail. This video is my explanation to those who comment about it. Ball is life.
Sent to my bestie in the literature dept. We're just a couple of millennial punks approaching 40.
I need more philosophy to be read by klingons
Dog and cat tax. Snuggle party with Clarice and Violet!
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Calabrian Risotto Recipe!
item.description: https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/calabrian-risotto/ I served it with a roast pork loin and it was SO good! Spicy, creamy, and so easy to make. If you don't have the Calabrian chili peppers, just use crushed red pepper to taste! 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil 1 yellow onion (peeled and small-diced) 4 cloves garlic (peeled and minced) 2 to 3 Calabrian chili peppers (trimmed and minced) 1 pint cherry tomatoes 1 cup carnaroli rice (or arborio rice) ½ cup dry white wine 5 cups chicken stock (warmed on the stove or in the microwave) 1 cup basil (loosely packed and roughly chopped) 1 cup Parmigiano Reggiano (finely grated) Salt and pepper Sauté the aromatics: Heat 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil in a wide pot over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté for 5 minutes. Add the minced garlic and Calabrian chili peppers. Sauté for 1 to 2 minutes. Add the cherry tomatoes and season with salt and pepper. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes. Toast the rice: Add the rice to the pot and toss to coat. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes. Add a big pinch of salt. Deglaze the pot with ½ cup wine and bring to a boil. Make the risotto: Add warm chicken stock in ladleful increments, stirring after each addition and adding more liquid once the rice absorbs what’s in the pot. Stir occasionally, but not constantly. You may need to adjust the heat between medium and medium-low to prevent the risotto from sticking. After 20 to 25 minutes, the rice should be tender and the liquid creamy. You may need 4 to 5 cups of liquid, give or take. Taste and add more salt and pepper. Finish the risotto: Turn the heat to low. Add the basil leaves and Parmigiano Reggiano cheese. Simmer for 5 minutes. Taste and season again with salt and pepper. Turn off the heat and let stand for 5 minutes. To serve: Transfer the risotto to a large serving bowl. Finish with more basil and grated Parmigiano Reggiano cheese if you like.
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: Opposite of manic Monday meme dump
item.description:
Been depressed all week. Binged memes, returning them to the wild now. Enjoy!
I have many generic quirks, but the only unique one seems to be that my cilantro gene mutated into basil so basil tastes like soap to me
It's true. Don't fact check me.
Saved this for a class I taught on the psychology of video games. We talked about sub culture and the feeling of community.
It is 2025. Don't make me use my phone for its original purpose.
My existence is pure spite at this point
My dad would do this. I made the mistake of showing this to him too so now he has the idea.
Tl:dr, asbestos
Vibe
One of mine can't stay in her damn assigned seat. Bitch ass cerebellum...
I've worked with both. Rats are sweet precious babies. Mice will fuck you up.
It's heartfelt and thought out. Thank you, kitty
Leave muted, stupid added music that sucks
Hon, the laptop can do a screenshot too. I have my own folder of saved canvas comments.
I have a border collie. My sister has a boxer. My bestie has a German. These all check out.
Poor seven of nine
Omg they were crewmates
Saved for class again, this time for biopsych
I don't want AI to do my creative stuff for me. I want AI to learn what I skip on YouTube and stop suggesting annoying trash to me. I have misophonia, I don't want ASMR crap.
Sound on for this one. Trust me.
Mmkay, but I've made a spam stir fry with cheese and it's good, so...
Wilson.
Sounds not needed but kind of fun here
Dog and cat tax. Clarice (cat) was trying to walk away from Violet (dog) licking her ears. Violet wasn't finished.
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish
